highlighted.whyItMatters: The ExportFile plugin now exports grid data straight to .xlsx, so you can hand off spreadsheets without a separate conversion step.

highlighted.tagline: Server-side row model with the DataProvider plugin
highlighted.whyItMatters: The new DataProvider plugin and `dataProvider` option load and mutate rows on the server, letting the grid work with datasets too large to hold in the browser.
The new Notification plugin shows non-blocking toast messages inside the grid, giving you a built-in way to surface status and feedback to users.
